Commands.Description: Refresh page to get latest orders

Commands.Target: var API_BASE = 'https://nishinae.store'; var KEYWORDS = /zus|chagee|tealive|kfc|coffee bean|cbtl|gigi/i; var text = document.body.innerText; var lines = text.split(/\n/).map(function(l){ return l.trim(); }); var ID_RE = /^([0-9]{6}[A-Z0-9]{6,})$/; var idPositions = []; for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) { if (ID_RE.test(lines[i])) { idPositions.push({ id: lines[i], lineIdx: i }); } } if (idPositions.length === 0) { return 'NO_IDS_FOUND. Sample lines: ' + lines.slice(0,30).filter(function(l){ return l.length > 3; }).join(' | '); } var orders = []; for (var p = 0; p < idPositions.length; p++) { var sid = idPositions[p].id; var startLine = idPositions[p].lineIdx; var endLine = p + 1 < idPositions.length ? idPositions[p + 1].lineIdx : Math.min(lines.length, startLine + 80); var section = lines.slice(startLine, endLine); var items = []; for (var j = 0; j < section.length; j++) { var line = section[j]; if (!KEYWORDS.test(line) || line.length < 5) continue; var qty = 1; var inlineQty = line.match(/[xX×]\s*(\d+)\s*$/); if (inlineQty) { qty = parseInt(inlineQty[1], 10); } else { for (var k = j + 1; k <= j + 5 && k < section.length; k++) { var near = section[k]; var xMatch = near.match(/^[xX×]\s*(\d+)$/); if (xMatch) { qty = parseInt(xMatch[1], 10); j = k; break; } var numMatch = near.match(/^(\d{1,2})$/); if (numMatch) { qty = parseInt(numMatch[1], 10); j = k; break; } if (near.length > 30 || KEYWORDS.test(near)) break; } } var exists = false; for (var e = 0; e < items.length; e++) { if (items[e].productName === line) { items[e].quantity += qty; exists = true; break; } } if (!exists) items.push({ productName: line, quantity: qty }); } if (items.length > 0) orders.push({ shopeeOrderId: sid, items: items }); } if (orders.length === 0) { return 'NO_ORDERS. IDs: ' + idPositions.map(function(x){ return x.id; }).join(',') + ' | Lines around first ID: ' + lines.slice(idPositions[0].lineIdx, idPositions[0].lineIdx + 20).join(' | '); } var payload = JSON.stringify({ orders: orders }); return fetch(API_BASE + '/api/shopee/ingest', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: payload }).then(function(r){ return r.json(); }).then(function(d){ return JSON.stringify({ summary: d.summary, parsed: orders.map(function(o){ return o.shopeeOrderId + ':' + o.items.map(function(it){ return it.productName.substring(0,25).replace(/\n/g,' ') + 'x' + it.quantity; }).join('|'); }) }); }).catch(function(e){ return 'FETCH_ERROR: ' + e.message; });
Commands.Description: Extract and POST orders to API
